hero_subtitle: SFTY supports FCA-aligned Travel Rule workflows by connecting multi-provider data, automating exception handling, and preserving audit evidence for regulatory review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions

problem_title: Travel Rule workflows struggle with fragmentation
problem_description: Compliance teams managing FCA Travel Rule requirements operate with disconnected message routing and case handling systems. This fragmentation slows reviews, complicates exception management and weakens audit evidence for regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates Travel Rule message routing, exception handling and jurisdictional rules into one case management workflow to streamline review, support traceability and preserve audit-ready evidence for FCA compliance.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule exceptions through review workflows to generate structured cases, preserve audit evidence, and support FCA-specific compliance reporting requirements.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule outputs across providers into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence to support FCA-specific compliance with clear operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FCA-regulated VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides FCA-regulated VASPs a compliance control layer connecting Travel Rule, KYC, KYT, case management, regulatory rules and evidence into connected, auditable workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support FCA Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures message routing, status tracking, exception handling and case creation to support FCA-specific Travel Rule requirements within broader compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence for Travel Rule events to support structured audit readiness under FCA supervision.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing FCA compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, enhancing FCA compliance without requiring tool replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers for FCA?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured FCA-compliant workflows without replacing them.
final_title: Review Travel Rule workflows tailored for FCA
final_description: See how SFTY connects provider data, supports exception handling and preserves audit evidence for FCA-regulated Travel Rule compliance.
